case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS. THOMAS G BROCK

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,060.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT BROCK, THOMAS G ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BROCK, THOMAS G
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO MARIN COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF AS TO DEFENDANT BROCK, THOMAS G

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RODERICK SHEHEE--SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROCK, THOMAS G $1,060.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,090.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
